entries.name: IllegalPayout

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: The system transaction contains an illegal payout.
fixes: Verify payout rules are followed for system transactions

entries.name: InsufficientTreasuryFunds

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: The treasury has insufficient funds for this payout.
fixes: Verify available treasury balance before initiating payout

entries.name: CommitmentAlreadyPresent

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: The commitment is already present in the system state.
fixes: Check if the commitment was already submitted before retrying

entries.name: UnknownError

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: An unknown error occurred in the system transaction.
fixes: Check node logs for additional details

entries.name: ReplayProtectionFailure

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: The system transaction failed replay protection checks.
fixes: Ensure the system transaction uses a unique identifier

entries.name: IllegalReserveDistribution

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: The reserve distribution in the system transaction is illegal.
fixes: Verify reserve distribution rules are correctly followed

entries.name: GenerationInfoAlreadyPresent

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: Generation info is already present for this system transaction.
fixes: Check if generation info was already submitted before retrying

entries.name: InvalidBasisPoints

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: The basis points value in the system transaction is invalid.
fixes: Ensure basis points are between 0 and 10000

entries.name: InvariantViolation

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: A system-level invariant was violated.
fixes: Check node logs for details on which invariant was violated

entries.name: TreasuryDisabled

group.name: System Transaction Errors (201-210)
group.description: Errors specific to system-level transactions.

entries.description: The treasury is disabled and cannot process this system transaction.
fixes: Verify treasury status before initiating payout

entries.name: HostApiError

group.name: Host API Errors
group.description: Errors returned from the host API layer.

entries.description: A host API error occurred during transaction processing.
fixes: Check node logs for the specific host API error
Verify SDK and node versions are compatible

entries.name: INVALID_PARAMS

group.name: JSON-RPC Errors
group.description: Standard JSON-RPC 2.0 error codes returned by the node RPC interface.

entries.description: Invalid parameters were provided to the JSON-RPC method.
fixes: Check the API documentation for correct parameter types and formats

entries.name: INTERNAL_ERROR

group.name: JSON-RPC Errors
group.description: Standard JSON-RPC 2.0 error codes returned by the node RPC interface.

entries.description: An internal error occurred on the node while processing the JSON-RPC request.
fixes: Check node logs for details
Retry the request
